# hrobot_failovers (Data Source)

List all Hetzner Robot failover IPs and their routing targets.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# All failover IPs on the account.
data "hrobot_failovers" "all" {}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `failovers` (Attributes List) All failover IPs. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--failovers))

<a id="nestedatt--failovers"></a>
### Nested Schema for `failovers`

Read-Only:

- `active_server_ip` (String) Main IP of the server the failover IP is currently routed to.
- `ip` (String) The failover IP address.
- `netmask` (String) Netmask of the failover IP.
- `server_ip` (String) Main IP of the server the failover IP belongs to.
- `server_ipv6_net` (String) IPv6 network of the server the failover IP belongs to.
- `server_number` (Number) Number of the server the failover IP belongs to.
